name: HTTP Inbound API
description: Allows custom applications to connect to OpenClaw via HTTP REST API with API key authentication

enabled.label: Enable HTTP Inbound Channel
enabled.help: Allow external applications to send messages via HTTP API

port.label: HTTP Server Port
port.help: Port for the HTTP API server (default: 3000)

host.label: Bind Address
host.help: Host to bind the HTTP server (0.0.0.0 for all interfaces, 127.0.0.1 for localhost only)

apiKeys.label: API Keys
apiKeys.help: Manage API keys for client applications. Each key grants access to send messages.
